sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44220" key="eu)ka/toptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐκάτ-οπτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n44220.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easily seen, conspicuous</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χῶρος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:27:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27.2</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>: c. dat., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τοῖς ἀθανάτοις εὐ</foreign>. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Satyr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Vit.Eur.Fr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39ii22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
